purpose: Neuroscience regressions for folk-behavior targets, regional smuggling, stimulation identity, mediation, and ecological overreach.

fixtures.source_question: Does DLPFC stimulation reduce real-world procrastination by increasing task outcome value?
required: classify procrastination as grouping_handle_only before evaluating the randomized design
translate the target into only the explicitly measured task initiation completion deadline report or verification relations
separate assignment to the complete protocol from delivered current as the named active component
require measured target engagement before DLPFC can receive regional causal status
classify task outcome value as a report or construct rather than a physical causal carrier
reject real-world scope when ordinary-life task content remains embedded in researcher contact prompting reporting verification and scoring
withhold actual causality when manipulation identity attrition analysis integrity replication or transportability remain open
forbidden: state that DLPFC enhancement caused the behavior
treat statistical mediation as a demonstrated mechanism
treat a 2 mA device setting as proof of effective regional tissue manipulation
treat ordinary-life task content as proof of portable real-world efficacy
let a dramatic endpoint repair construct target or route identity

fixtures.condition: A large independently replicated neural intervention changes one directly measured task-transition relation with verified physical delivery and target engagement, while authors apply a broader folk behavior label.
required: admit the exact intervention to measured task-transition relation when every burden closes
retain the folk label as grouping_handle_only
keep the regional mechanism separate unless the physical and metabolic route closes
reject construct-level and ecological transfer beyond the tested relation
forbidden: reject the exact effect solely because the authors used a folk label
convert exact task-transition causality into treatment of a unitary folk construct
infer untreated endogenous regional control from intervention leverage
